# Rust & Sawdust KY

> Insured home improvement and custom building contractor based in Somerset, Kentucky, serving the Lake Cumberland region within a 40-mile radius. Decks, porches, pole barns, remodels, concrete, custom woodwork, and specialty builds — every job backed by a 2-year warranty.

Rust & Sawdust KY is a family-run general contractor handling residential, commercial, and facility-management work. The crew is insured and experienced, offers free estimates, and gives discounts to U.S. Veterans and first-time customers.

- Location: Somerset, Kentucky (Pulaski County)
- Service area: Somerset and the Lake Cumberland region, within a 40-mile radius
- Phone / text: 502-542-4473
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 9am–5pm, closed Sunday
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 28 verified Thumbtack reviews

## Services

- [Decks, Porches & Patio Covers](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/decks-porches): Covered porches, open and multi-level decks, awnings, and patio overhangs in cedar or treated lumber.
- [Screened Rooms & Pergolas](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/screened-rooms-pergolas): Screened porch enclosures, pergolas, and outdoor living rooms built for lake-house life.
- [Buildings, Barns & Sheds](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/buildings-barns-sheds): Post-frame pole barns, custom garages, workshops, and storage sheds finished to match your home.
- [Concrete & Excavating](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/concrete-excavating): Driveways, patios, flatwork, site prep, grading, and stained or standard concrete.
- [Custom Woodwork](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/custom-woodwork): Live-edge countertops, pipe shelving, home bars, built-ins, and one-of-a-kind interior builds.
- [Home Add-Ons & Remodels](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/additions-remodels): Room additions, bathroom and kitchen remodels, and full residential or commercial renovations.
- [Windows, Trim & Painting](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/windows-trim-painting): Window installation, interior trim and finish carpentry, and interior/exterior painting.
- [Golf Greens & Specialty Projects](https://rustandsawdustky.com/services/golf-greens-specialty): Custom backyard putting greens and one-off specialty builds — no job too big or small.
